data_room.description: Executive view for AML alert management - alerts, accounts, cases, customers, transactions, and watchlist screening. Migrated from e2-demo-west.
data_room.suggestion_description:
This space provides an executive overview of AML alert management, enabling analysis of alerts, accounts, cases, customers, transactions, and watchlist screenings.

**Capabilities:**
- Track and analyze AML alerts by scenario, status, analyst assignment, and resolution outcomes
- Monitor open and closed cases, investigation times, SAR requirements, and disposition reasons
- Review customer risk profiles, PEP status, KYC information, and related accounts
- Evaluate account activity, balances, transaction patterns, and high-risk behaviors
- Assess watchlist screening results, match scores, dispositions, and connections to customers
- Identify alerts or cases by team, priority, and SLA status for operational insight

**Limitations:**
- Does not provide real-time data or event monitoring capabilities
- No access to external regulatory lists or up-to-date sanctions information beyond internal watchlist screening
- Lacks direct integration for workflow or document management (e.g., uploading evidence)

description: Executive view for AML alert management - alerts, accounts, cases, customers, transactions, and watchlist screening. Migrated from e2-demo-west.
